title: [Cloud] Flamingo - Unpairing the charge case from the headset
scenario: Voyager Legend 50 charge case unpairing does not persist when reconnecting headset to Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap 'Clear' next to 'Clear Trusted Device list' (app shows device as disconnected)
Remove the device from the app (e.g., tap Remove Device or similar)
Remove the device from phone Bluetooth settings
Remove the device from the Poly cloud web page (Plantronics Manager or similar)
Reconnect the headset to the app via normal pairing flow
Observe the device appears as a standalone headset (headset only, no charge case)
Check the cloud web page for the device listing
expected: On the cloud web page, the device should be visible as 'Voyager Legend 50' with only headset information/image (no charge case). In the app, the device should appear as a standalone headset.
